title: Work Out!
description: This mod adds the ability for players to level up their character with special equipment
body:
This mod adds the ability for players to level up their character with special sports equipment.

The mod itself is not required for use, as weapon damage is still the same (and increases with character leveling), but bare hand damage depends on character leveling.

Also added some commands to find out your current arm and leg strength:



/get(leg/arm)strength

/add(leg/arm)strength100

/set(leg/arm)strength0



It is also worth mentioning that when the player reaches certain heights in working with the barbell, he gains the following abilities:



Weak Jump

Average Jump

Strong Jump
